  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the primary function of producers in an ecosystem?",
      "options": [
        "A) To consume other organisms for energy",
        "B) To create complex food webs",
        "C) To convert sunlight into energy",
        "D) To regulate the water cycle"
      ],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "Producers, such as plants and algae, convert sunlight into energy through photosynthesis, which is the primary function of producers in an ecosy
